scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run mobile:build && npm run validate:android-local && npm run build
scripts.android:sync: npm run mobile:build && cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.test:cloud-practice-attempt: rm -rf .next/cloud-practice-attempt && tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2020 --outDir .next/cloud-practice-attempt --noEmit false --declaration false --sourceMap false --incremental false scripts/test-cloud-practice-attempt.ts lib/practice/cloudPracticeAttempt.ts && node .next/cloud-practice-attempt/scripts/test-cloud-practice-attempt.js
